SIGHTING: A man in a tattered duster seen near the Marple ruins. He carries a big iron on his hip.
COMMUNIQUE: Vault-Tec reminds you that Total Parity is the foundation of a happy life.
WARNING: Rad-roach infestation detected in the lower maintenance tunnels. Check the fiber lines.
LEGEND: The Master once sought a way to evolve all dwellers. He was defeated by a single soul.
ADVISORY: Radioactive rain detected over Marple. Ensure the 140TB archive is shielded.
SIGNAL: A broadcast from GNR is occasionally skipping through the static. Three-Dog is still howling.
DWELLER LOG: The stone walls were laid in 1740. The ghosts of Marple are watching the servers.
SIGHTING: An Enclave vertibird spotted flying high over the Pennsylvania woods.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: A paladin was seen scavenging for pre-war technology near the old mall.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Stoney Lonesome water reserves are at 104%. The purification chip is holding.
PIP-BOY UPDATE: Firmware v7.2.3 installed. Interface glow set to Amber Phosphor.
WARNING: Cazadores have nested in the chimney of the old stone house.
RECOVERY: Pre-war holotapes found in a desk drawer. Content: The Silver Shroud.
BROADCAST: Agatha is playing her violin. The wasteland feels a little smaller tonight.
SCAVENGER LOG: Found a pristine crate of Nuka-Cola Quantum near the UDM-Pro.
RUMOR: They say the Overseer has a direct line to the President of the New Republic.
MAINTENANCE: Parity check at 5.2%. The machine spirit is patient.
FINAL LOG: War. War never changes.
ADVISORY: Mandatory Blue Route decontamination protocols are now in effect for all returning scouts.
SIGHTING: A Yao Guai was seen sharpening its claws on the remains of a Welcome to Pennsylvania sign.
COMMUNIQUE: Vault-Tec reminds you that excessive whistling in the atrium is a sign of mental instability.
WARNING: Feral Ghouls have occupied the basement of the old Springfield Mall. Avoid the food court.
LEGEND: They say the Burned Man still walks the canyons of the west. Some fires never go out.
MAINTENANCE: Water chip rattling detected. Please tap the casing firmly with a rubber mallet.
DWELLER LOG: Found an old Eagles jersey in the ruins. The fabric is gone, but the spite remains.
SIGNAL: A faint distress call from Vault 76 has been looping for 25 years. Ignore it.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Sugar Bomb stocks are critical. Substitutions will be made with Cram flavored gelatin.
RUMOR: A caravan from The Hub is heading east. Theyre trading gold for pre-war circuit boards.
SIGHTING: A Super Mutant Behemoth is currently using a rusted school bus as a club near Media.
PIP-BOY UPDATE: V.A.T.S. calibration complete. Probability of hitting Rad-Rat increased by 0.04%.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: Scribes are requesting more burned books for carbon dating. Do not ask why.
WARNING: High concentrations of Mirelurks detected near the Ridley Creek banks.
ADVISORY: Please refrain from using the Overseer’s terminal to play Red Menace during work shifts.
RECOVERY: A pristine Grognak the Barbarian comic found in a locker. Dweller morale +5%.
SCAVENGER LOG: The SEPTA rails are completely overgrown. The trains are finally on time.
COMMUNIQUE: Trust your Overseer. Your Overseer is your friend. Your friend knows what is best.
SIGHTING: A lone Wanderer in an armored jumpsuit was seen looting a Red Rocket station.
MAINTENANCE: The air filtration system is emitting a smell of Old World Cinnamon. Investigation pending.
LEGEND: Beware the Mothman of the Appalachian border. His eyes glow like two dying embers.
SIGNAL: Radio Freedom is broadcasting a request for assistance. Another settlement needs help.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Nuka-Cola Victory is now the official beverage of the Vault 101 bowling league.
WARNING: Deathclaw nesting site identified in the ruins of the local Wawa.
DWELLER LOG: I miss the sound of rain that doesnt make your skin itch.
SIGHTING: A robotic eyebot is hovering over the ruins, playing patriotic marches on a loop.
ADVISORY: Residents are reminded that Mutant Fruit is not an approved ingredient for the bake sale.
RUMOR: They say a man in a checkered suit is looking for a delivery boy in the Mojave.
MAINTENANCE: Gravity-fed waste disposal is backed up. Please stop flushing T-51b pauldrons.
BROADCAST: The Rose of Sharon Cassidy is looking for a drink. The pubs of Philly are dry.
PIP-BOY UPDATE: Added Geiger Counter audio cues. Click-click-click means run-run-run.
RECOVERY: Found a stash of Sunset Sarsaparilla star bottle caps. They feel... significant.
SCAVENGER LOG: The Liberty Bell is missing. There is a very large crater where it used to be.
COMMUNIQUE: Exercise is mandatory. A healthy dweller is a productive dweller.
WARNING: A Glowing One has been spotted in the sub-basement of the Drexel Hill library.
LEGEND: The Mysterious Stranger helped a dweller in a pinch today. Then he vanished into thin air.
SUPPLY UPDATE: BlamCo Mac & Cheese is now 40% more Cheese-Like by volume.
SIGHTING: Vertibird patrols have increased. The Brotherhood is looking for something in the woods.
SIGNAL: A mysterious signal is broadcasting coordinates to a place called The Pitt.
MAINTENANCE: Lights in Sector 4 flickering in Morse code. It says: FEED ME.
ADVISORY: Do not pet the Rad-Stags. They have twice the heads and four times the attitude.
DWELLER LOG: Day 14,203. The synthetic sunlight still feels a bit too yellow.
RUMOR: A Vault Dweller once saved the world with a water chip and a prayer.
SCAVENGER LOG: Found a working Giddyup Buttercup. It bit me.
WARNING: Dust storms from the west are carrying Fever Bloom spores. Seal all vents.
COMMUNIQUE: Identity checks are random. Please keep your Vault Suit crisp and your hair tidy.
SIGHTING: A group of Regulators is tracking a bounty near the old stone quarry.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Synthetic steak production has stalled. Enjoy your Tofu-Cram loaf.
PIP-BOY UPDATE: New map marker added: The Big Empty. Proceed with extreme caution.
MAINTENANCE: The Mr. Handy unit in the kitchen has developed a sarcastic personality.
ADVISORY: Remember, Total Parity means everyone gets exactly one-eighth of a sweetroll.
RECOVERY: A pre-war Holotape of a baseball game. The Phillies lost. Some things never change.
SIGNAL: Galaxy News Radio is playing I Dont Want to Set the World on Fire. Again.
LEGEND: They talk of a City of Steel to the west where the sky is always orange.
WARNING: Tunnel Snakes have been sighted in the ventilation ducts. They rule.
SCAVENGER LOG: Found a Stealth Boy. Used it to hide from my supervisor for three hours.
DWELLER LOG: The Overseers coffee smells like kerosene today. Im not telling him.
RUMOR: A Courier survived a bullet to the head. Some people are just too stubborn to die.
SIGHTING: A pack of Feral Mongrels is circling the vault entrance. Keep the blast door shut.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Stimpak production is at an all-time high. Please stop accidentally stabbing yourselves.
MAINTENANCE: The bio-organic waste processor is humming a tune. It sounds like jazz.
COMMUNIQUE: Vault-Tec: The Choice of Tomorrow, Today! (Standard disclaimer applies).
ADVISORY: Radiation suits are not fashion statements. Wear them properly.
RECOVERY: Found a Fat Man tactical nuke launcher. It’s been placed in the High Risk locker.
SIGNAL: A broadcast from The Tops casino. They invite you to The Ring-a-Ding-Ding.
WARNING: Bloatfly larvae detected in the hydroponics bay. Wash your vegetables.
LEGEND: The Chosen One once dismantled an oil rig with a single explosive charge.
SCAVENGER LOG: The ruins of the Pennsylvania Turnpike are a graveyard of Corvegas.
DWELLER LOG: I saw a flower growing in a crack in the concrete. I didnt have the heart to pick it.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Fancy Lads Snack Cakes are now 200 years past their expiration date. Still delicious.
RUMOR: There is a Railroad that helps toasters escape their fate. Sounds ridiculous.
SIGHTING: A Super Mutant in a lab coat was seen talking to a bucket of green goo.
MAINTENANCE: The Parity Check has found a soul in the machine. It has been deleted.
PIP-BOY UPDATE: Added Radioactive Rain weather alert. Suggestion: Seek shelter immediately.
ADVISORY: All G.E.C.K. units are currently out of stock. Please use a watering can instead.
COMMUNIQUE: Happiness is a requirement. Misery is a fireable offense.
WARNING: Raiders have set up a toll booth on the remains of Route 1. Do not pay.
SIGNAL: An Enclave frequency is playing The Star-Spangled Banner on a loop.
RECOVERY: Found a Bobblehead for Repair. Suddenly, I know how to fix the toaster.
SCAVENGER LOG: The King of Prussia mall is now the Kingdom of the Mirelurks.
DWELLER LOG: I think the walls are getting closer together. Or maybe Im getting wider.
LEGEND: A man in a Silver Shroud costume is fighting crime in the Commonwealth.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Fresh water is now 0.02% less metallic. Enjoy the Spring Fresh taste.
MAINTENANCE: The elevator to the surface is jammed. This is for your own protection.
RUMOR: They say the Great Khan tribe is migrating through the Delaware Valley.
SIGHTING: A Sentry Bot is still guarding the ruins of a post office. It is very dedicated.
ADVISORY: Do not feed the Rad-Roaches. They are pests, not pets.
WARNING: A Rad-Storm is approaching from the direction of Harrisburg.
COMMUNIQUE: Vault-Tec wishes you a Super-Duper day in the underground!
RECOVERY: Found a Mentats tin. Suddenly, the math makes sense.
SIGNAL: A Minuteman radio station is asking for help at The Castle.
SCAVENGER LOG: The old Colonial Village is now a Raider Outpost. Stay away.
DWELLER LOG: I dreamed of a blue sky. When I woke up, the ceiling was gray.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Insta-Mash is now available in Dirt flavor. (Wait, that’s just dirt).
MAINTENANCE: The Auto-Doc has accidentally removed a dwellers appendix. It was a routine dental check.
PIP-BOY UPDATE: Wild Wasteland mode toggled. Did that cactus just wink at me?
LEGEND: A Lone Bolt from the sky once leveled an entire town called Megaton.
RUMOR: The Institute is watching us through the eyes of the crows.
SIGHTING: A Caravan Guard was seen fighting off a Deathclaw with a rolling pin.
ADVISORY: Please return all overdue Holotapes to the library. Late fees apply.
WARNING: Rad-Scorpions have been found in the laundry room. Check your boots.
SIGNAL: A Black Mountain radio host is talking about Battle Cattle.
RECOVERY: Found a Nuka-Cola recipe for something called Nuka-Cide.
SCAVENGER LOG: The Conshohocken Curve is still a traffic nightmare, even in the apocalypse.
DWELLER LOG: The Overseer says the Overseer is the only one who can see the Oversee.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Dandy Boy Apples are now 100% apple-free.
MAINTENANCE: The Fusion Core is humming a B-Flat. This is normal. Probably.
COMMUNIQUE: Loyalty is its own reward. But a Vault-Tec sticker is also nice.
LEGEND: They say the Courier has a robot dog with a transparent brain.
RUMOR: A Secret Vault exists where everyone is a clone named Gary.
SIGHTING: A Vertibird crashed in the Marple woods. The survivors are cranky.
ADVISORY: Do not use Jet before operating heavy machinery or the Vault Elevator.
WARNING: Feral Ghouls are attracted to the sound of Holotape recorders.
SIGNAL: A faint broadcast of Butcher Pete is coming from the south.
RECOVERY: Found a T-45 power armor helmet. It makes a great planter.
SCAVENGER LOG: The Swarthmore campus is now a Super Mutant stronghold.
DWELLER LOG: I miss Wawa hoagies. The Cram sub just isnt the same.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Med-X supplies are low. Please try Deep Breathing instead.
MAINTENANCE: The Geiger Counter in the lobby is clicking. It’s probably just a ghost.
PIP-BOY UPDATE: Added V.A.T.S. targeting for Sentimental Value items.
LEGEND: The Master was a man, a machine, and a puddle of goo. All at once.
RUMOR: The President of the United States lives on an oil rig. Or did.
SIGHTING: A Brotherhood of Steel Paladin is stuck in a tree. Do not laugh.
ADVISORY: Rad-Away is not a beverage. Please stop drinking it with ice.
WARNING: Cazadores are faster than they look. And they look fast.
SIGNAL: A Pre-War commercial for Abraxo Cleaner is looping on the emergency band.
RECOVERY: Found a Gnome. It seems to be watching me.
SCAVENGER LOG: The Schuylkill River is now a neon green sludge. No change there.
DWELLER LOG: I think the Mr. Handy is judging my cooking.
SUPPLY UPDATE: YumYum Deviled Eggs are now YumYum Radioactive Eggs.
MAINTENANCE: The Vault Door seal is 99% airtight. That 1% is for Character.
COMMUNIQUE: Remember: The Surface is a myth. The Vault is reality.
LEGEND: A Vault Dweller once defeated a giant robot with a Liberty Prime heart.
RUMOR: There is a City of Ghouls in an old history museum.
SIGHTING: A Rad-Toad is sitting on the Marple courthouse steps.
ADVISORY: Buffout is for emergencies only. Not for winning the Vault arm-wrestling contest.
WARNING: Mirelurk Kings have a voice like an angel. A very angry, sonic-blasting angel.
SIGNAL: The Enclave is reminding you that America still exists. Somewhere.
RECOVERY: Found a Lunchbox. It contained a Plastic Spoon and a Nuclear Pulse.
SCAVENGER LOG: The Havertown ruins are full of Rad-Roaches in tiny hats.
DWELLER LOG: Ive forgotten what a Tree looks like. I mean, a green one.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Purified Water is now available in Metal flavor.
MAINTENANCE: The Computer Room is overheating. Please stop using the mainframes to bake bread.
PIP-BOY UPDATE: Radioactive status now includes Spontaneous Limb Growth warnings.
LEGEND: A Mysterious Stranger appears when you least expect him. Usually with a .44.
RUMOR: The Overseer is actually a Synth. (This message has been censored).
SIGHTING: A Deathclaw was seen wearing a Pre-War hat. It looked dapper.
ADVISORY: Please do not attempt to Hack the Vending Machines.
WARNING: Rad-Storms can cause Ghouls to wake up. And they’re cranky.
SIGNAL: A Pre-War distress signal from a Pulowski Preservation Shelter.
RECOVERY: Found a Garden of Eden Creation Kit. Oh wait, it’s just a toaster.
SCAVENGER LOG: The Blue Route is still jammed. Some things never change.
DWELLER LOG: I miss the smell of Fresh Cut Grass. Now everything smells like Rust.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Rad-X is now available in Chewable form. Tastes like Chalk.
MAINTENANCE: The Life Support system is making a Squeaking sound. Ignore it.
COMMUNIQUE: Vault-Tec cares about your Mental Health. Please report for Brain Scanning.
LEGEND: The Chosen One once saved a Village with a G.E.C.K.
RUMOR: There is a Vault where everyone is a Super Mutant.
SIGHTING: A Brotherhood of Steel Vertibird is dropping Flyers. It’s Junk Mail.
ADVISORY: Please do not use Power Armor in the Dining Hall.
WARNING: Cazadores have been spotted in the Ventilation Shafts.
SIGNAL: A Pre-War radio station is playing Maybe by The Ink Spots.
RECOVERY: Found a Nuka-Cola Quantum. It’s glowing. Is it supposed to glow?
SCAVENGER LOG: The Media ruins are full of Rad-Scorpions.
DWELLER LOG: I think the Overseer is watching me. Through the Camera.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Stimpaks are now 10% more Stingy.
MAINTENANCE: The Water Purifier is making a Gurgling sound. It’s Thirsty.
PIP-BOY UPDATE: Added V.A.T.S. targeting for Rad-Roach antennae.
LEGEND: The Master was defeated by a Single Soul with a Speech skill of 100.
RUMOR: The President is a Computer.
SIGHTING: A Yao Guai was seen eating a Raider. It looked Delicious.
ADVISORY: Please do not Loiter in the Vault Door area.
WARNING: Rad-Storms are Dangerous. Stay Inside.
SIGNAL: A Pre-War signal is broadcasting The Silver Shroud radio play.
RECOVERY: Found a Bobblehead for Luck. I feel Lucky.
SCAVENGER LOG: The Philadelphia ruins are Full of Ghouls.
DWELLER LOG: I miss Daylight. The Artificial light is Too Bright.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Nuka-Cola is now Rare. Drink Water.
MAINTENANCE: The Elevator is Broken. Use the Stairs.
COMMUNIQUE: Vault-Tec is Watching you. Behave.
LEGEND: The Lone Wanderer once Saved the Capital Wasteland.
RUMOR: There is a Vault with No Doors.
SIGHTING: A Deathclaw was seen Sleeping in a Car.
ADVISORY: Please do not Feed the Mirelurks.
WARNING: Rad-Roaches are Everywhere.
SIGNAL: A Pre-War signal is broadcasting I Dont Want to Set the World on Fire.
RECOVERY: Found a Stealth Boy. Where did it go?
SCAVENGER LOG: The Wawa ruins are Empty. No Hoagies.
DWELLER LOG: Im Bored. Lets go Exploring.
SUPPLY UPDATE: Cram is now Extra Salty.
MAINTENANCE: The Lights are Flickering. It’s Ghostly.
PIP-BOY UPDATE: Amber is the New Green.
LEGEND: The Courier once Decided the Fate of New Vegas.
RUMOR: The Overseer has a Secret Stash of Nuka-Cola.
SIGHTING: A Super Mutant was seen Reading a Book.
ADVISORY: Please do not Run in the Halls.
WARNING: Rad-Storm alert. Shields up.
SIGNAL: GNR is Back on the Air.
FINAL LOG: War. War never changes. But we do.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: Paladin squads report a 15% increase in Technology Recovery yields near the ruins of Philly.
ENCLAVE: Encrypted transmission intercepted. Frequency: 108.4. Subject: Project Rebirth—Phase 4 begins at midnight.
RAIDER WATCH: The Delco Scrappers have claimed the old refinery. Expect increased aggression near the perimeter.
NCR INTELLIGENCE: Remnants of the 5th Battalion spotted near the Appalachian border. They are looking for a way home.
INSTITUTE: Reports of missing settlers in the valley have tripled. Check all dwellers for subtle behavioral shifts.
LEGION: A scouting party of Decurions was seen crossing the Susquehanna. They carry the mark of the Bull.
RAILROAD: A dead drop was found in the Marple library. The Package has been moved to a safehouse in Chester.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: Scribes have successfully restored a pre-war mainframe. Initial data: Philadelphia Experiment was a hoax.
ENCLAVE: Satellite imagery shows activity at the Raven Rock ruins. Someone is turning the lights back on.
MINUTEMEN: A flare was sighted over the Springfield ruins. No local response recorded. The Commonwealth is far away.
TALON COMPANY: Mercenary contracts for Vault Security Disruption are circulating in the underworld. Double the guard.
FOLLOWERS OF THE APOCALYPSE: A small group has set up a clinic in a rusted bus. They are trading medicine for history books.
RAIDER WATCH: The Pitt Raiders are expanding south. Steel production is up; mercy is down.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: The Prydwen is docked at the Boston Airport. Logistics ships are moving supplies to the Keystone region.
ENCLAVE: Eye-bots are broadcasting a New America speech. Do not listen to the propaganda. It causes headaches.
NCR INTELLIGENCE: Trade caravans with NCR seals have been hijacked. The Gun Runners are offering a bounty on the thieves.
LEGION: Rumor: Caesar has set his sights on the Great Steel Cities of the East. Prepare the defenses.
INSTITUTE: A Courser was seen tracking a synth near the vault entrance. Keep the blast door locked.
RAILROAD: Code word Highrise is currently compromised. Switch to Deep-Six protocols for all external contacts.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: Elder Maxson has issued a mandatory Synths are Abominations lecture. Attendance is not optional.
RAIDER WATCH: A group of Disciples from Nuka-World was seen scouting the local power plant.
ENCLAVE: Bio-signature detected. A high-ranking official is moving through the Pennsylvania woods. Identity: Unknown.
NCR INTELLIGENCE: President Kimball’s latest speech was met with silence in the outer territories. The Republic is stretched thin.
LEGION: The Burning Man has been spotted in the dreams of the tribals. Fear is a powerful weapon.
RAILROAD: P.A.M. has calculated a 72% chance of a Brotherhood raid on the local safehouse.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: Vertibird patrols have been ordered to shoot on sight any unidentified drones.
ENCLAVE: A Sigma squad was seen retrieving a shipment of FEV canisters from a hidden bunker.
RAIDER WATCH: The Tunnel Snakes have been wiped out by a pack of Rad-Roaches. Justice is served.
INSTITUTE: Directors Directive 402: All surface operations must remain covert. Do not leave footprints.
MINUTEMEN: General sightings reported near the old castle. He was seen picking up every piece of desk fan he found.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: Knights are complaining about the humidity in the power armor. Recommendation: More talcum powder.
ENCLAVE: Automated broadcast: Citizens of America, your government is watching. Be proud. Be pure.
NCR INTELLIGENCE: The Long 15 trade route is currently closed due to nuclear fallout. Prices of stimpaks have risen 200%.
LEGION: Legate Lanius is said to be carving his way through the Midwest. The Bulls shadow is long.
RAILROAD: A synth named H2-22 has successfully reached the Cloud safehouse. Morale is high.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: A cache of T-51b parts was found in an old National Guard armory. Maintenance is ecstatic.
ENCLAVE: The Hellfire armor project has been resumed. The fires of the old world are being stoked.
RAIDER WATCH: The Pack has released a group of feral dogs into the ruins. Avoid the suburbs.
INSTITUTE: A Gorilla synth escaped the lab. If seen, do not approach. It is programmed for Maximum Hugs.
MINUTEMEN: Another settlement needs your help. The message is looping on all frequencies.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: Proctors are requesting Pre-War Technical Documents. They will pay in exposure and honor.
ENCLAVE: A secret Vault-Tec override code was detected on the Overseers terminal. Connection severed.
NCR INTELLIGENCE: The Rangers have set up an observation post on the highest hill in the county.
LEGION: Crosses have been seen along the highway. The Legion’s brand of order has arrived.
RAILROAD: Deacon was seen in the vault cafeteria. Wait, no, that was just a very similar-looking dweller.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: A Paladin lost his Holotag in a game of poker. He is currently cleaning the latrines.
ENCLAVE: Orbital strike coordinates being calculated for Sector 7. That’s us. Recalculating... Error.
RAIDER WATCH: The Great Khans are trading Chems for Ammo near the quarry ruins.
INSTITUTE: A Watchman synth was found disguised as a mailbox. It was very well-informed.
MINUTEMEN: The Artillery test was a success. The old stone bridge is now a pile of rubble.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: Liberty Prime is currently 35% operational. Democracy is non-negotiable.
ENCLAVE: President Eden has requested a playlist of 1940s jazz. The AI is feeling nostalgic.
NCR INTELLIGENCE: A Brahmin caravan was seen carrying a G.E.C.K. case. It was empty. The caravan was sad.
LEGION: Frumentarii are infiltrating the local settlements. Trust no one who speaks Latin.
RAILROAD: The Freedom Trail has been painted over by a group of raiders. Follow the blood instead.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: A Scribe accidentally deleted the Power Armor manual. Everyone is now winging it.
ENCLAVE: Tesla armor units are being deployed to the Blue Route intersection.
RAIDER WATCH: The Operators have started a Protection Racket at the local water pump.
INSTITUTE: Shaun is requesting more Cigars for the break room. Science is stressful.
MINUTEMEN: A Supply Line has been established between The Castle and Sanctuary.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: Ad Victoriam is now the official greeting, goodbye, and toast of the Chapter.
ENCLAVE: God Bless America is being played at 140 decibels over the radio. Ears are bleeding.
NCR INTELLIGENCE: A Veteran Ranger was seen taking down a Deathclaw with a single knife. He looked bored.
LEGION: Vulpus Inculta has been seen in the local market. He was wearing a dog on his head.
RAILROAD: Desdemona is planning a Prison Break at the Institute holding facility.
BROTHERHOOD OF STEEL: A Knight tried to use Power Armor to open a can of Cram. It didnt end well.
ENCLAVE: Plasma weapon testing is causing Green Glow sightings in the valley.
RAIDER WATCH: The Rust Devils are building a Robo-Brain army in the basement of a Best Buy.
INSTITUTE: Synth Retention is tracking a Class-A runaway. They’ve requested Vault Cooperation.
MR. NEW VEGAS: The local forecast calls for 100% chance of heartbreak, but a 0% chance of rain. Stay classy, Vegas.
SIGHTING: A traveler in a gas mask was seen picking through the rusted remains of the King of Prussia food court.
THREE DOG: Coming to you loud and proud from the Chevy Chase ruins! This is GNR, and I’m here for you, children.
LOCAL VIBE: The wind howling through the hollowed-out SEPTA cars sounds like a choir of the damned.
RADIO FREEDOM: Attention all Minutemen. Reports of a feral ghoul problem at the old Ridley Creek farm. Help requested.
ADVISORY: The Schuylkill River has turned a vibrant shade of violet. Please update your Geiger counter presets.
MR. NEW VEGAS: A courier with a delivery for the Lucky 38 was seen heading toward the Strip. Place your bets, folks.
DWELLER LOG: Found a stash of Tastykakes in an airtight locker. They still have that pre-war chemical glow.
TRAVIS MILES: Uh, I guess... theres a rumor of a big green monster near the Common? Maybe stay away? If you want?
WARNING: Rad-scorpions have taken over the remains of the Broomall post office. Mail delivery is delayed.
BLACK MOUNTAIN RADIO: Human-dom is over! Best Friend Tabitha says the era of the Utobitha is here!
LOCAL VIBE: The Blue Route is finally clear of traffic, mostly because the asphalt has melted into the dirt.
THREE DOG: Dont feed the Yao Guai! Thats a PSA from your favorite DJ. They are not as cuddly as they look.
SIGNAL: A looping broadcast from a Pulowski Preservation Shelter near Marple Road.
SCAVENGER LOG: The old stone walls of the 1740 house are the only thing standing. The ghosts have high rad-resistance.
ADVISORY: Please refrain from using Abraxo Cleaner as a substitute for toothpaste. Your enamel is not a floor.
LOCAL VIBE: In the Philly ruins, the Rocky statue has been replaced by a shrine to a two-headed bear.
THREE DOG: The Brotherhood and the Enclave are playing a very loud game of tag. Stay in your holes, children!
DWELLER LOG: I saw a group of scavengers fighting over an old Wawa coffee cup like it was a holy relic.
SIGNAL: Agatha’s Station is playing a somber violin solo. It makes the air in the Vault feel heavy.
TRAVIS MILES: So, theres a radio station... this one... and Im talking on it. This is Diamond City Radio. I think.
RAIDER WATCH: The Delco Drifters have set up a sniper nest in the steeple of an old stone church.
LOCAL VIBE: The trees in the Pennsylvania woods dont lose their leaves anymore. They just turn gray and brittle.
SUPPLY UPDATE: We are down to our last 400 boxes of BlamCo. The Overseer suggests Cram-Kabobs for dinner.
SIGNAL: A high-frequency chirp is coming from the UDM-Pro. It sounds like a computer trying to scream.
LOCAL VIBE: Found a pre-war Eagles banner in the rubble. It’s the only thing that hasnt decayed.
SCAVENGER LOG: Found a working Nuka-Cola vending machine in the Marple ruins. It took my last cap and gave me nothing.
WARNING: Mirelurk eggs have been spotted in the vaults secondary drainage pipes.
LOCAL VIBE: The silence in the Pennsylvania woods is louder than the bombs were.
SIGNAL: A broadcast from The Tops is playing Aint That a Kick in the Head on a loop.
DWELLER LOG: The Overseer says Total Parity is the goal. I think it just means we all get the same crappy shoes.
ADVISORY: If you see a Deathclaw wearing a hat, it is likely a hallucination. Seek medical attention.
LOCAL VIBE: The Blue Route bridge is missing a middle section. Scavengers have built a rope bridge.
TRAVIS MILES: Is this thing on? I... Im just gonna play a song. Please dont kill me.
SIGNAL: The Enclave frequency is broadcasting a recipe for Apple Pie. It’s 90% sawdust.
LOCAL VIBE: The old Wawa sign is still flickering. It’s the only light for miles.
SIGHTING: A Brotherhood of Steel vertibird was seen hovering over the Springfield reservoir.
LOCAL VIBE: The ghosts of the Main Line are still waiting for a train thats 200 years late.
SIGNAL: A Morse code signal is coming from the old stone house. It says: STILL HERE.
SECURITY: Incident in Diner. Dweller #402 attempted to pay for a sweetroll with Pre-War Stock Options. Denied.
DWELLER LOG: Found a note in the vents. It just says He is watching over and over.
INCIDENT: Dweller #112 reported missing. Last seen entering the Unfinished Storage Wing with a flashlight.
SECURITY: Mandatory search of Sector 3 revealed a hidden stash of Day Tripper. Dweller #509 detained.
INTERNAL: The Mr. Handy unit in the nursery has started calling the children Future Organic Waste.
DWELLER LOG: Someone is stealing all the left shoes in the dormitory. This is a clear violation of Total Parity.
INCIDENT: Small fire in the kitchen. Dweller #201 tried to Fast-Travel a Salisbury Steak in the microwave.
SECURITY: Unauthorized Radio Free Marple broadcast detected on the internal comms. Signal traced to a toaster.
INTERNAL: Oxygen levels in the gym have been reduced to 15% to encourage efficiency. Efficiency is up 2%.
DWELLER LOG: The water tastes like pennies and old socks today. Security says its Mineral Enriched.
SECURITY: Dweller #334 caught attempting to Pickpocket the Overseer. Sentenced to 48 hours in the hot-box.
INCIDENT: A Rad-Roach the size of a terrier was found in the laundry. It was wearing a tiny sweater.
INTERNAL: All Happy-Vibes emitters in the air vents are now at maximum capacity. Smile, dwellers!
SECURITY: Confiscated a Modified Pip-Boy from the machine shop. It was tuned to Enclave balloons.
INCIDENT: Total Parity violation! Dweller #662 was found with two extra packets of YumYum Deviled Eggs.
INTERNAL: The Automated Hairdresser has malfunctioned. 14 dwellers now have the Moe the Barber special.
SECURITY: Patrols increased in the Maintenance Tunnels. Reports of Scuttling sounds behind the fiber lines.
INCIDENT: The Vault-Tec motivational posters have been vandalized with the words THE LIES ARE COLD.
INTERNAL: Overseer’s Decree: Whistling while you work is now punishable by a reduction in Fun Credits.
SECURITY: Attempted Vault Door breach from the inside. Dweller #991 claimed they Forgot their keys.
INCIDENT: The Auto-Doc in the clinic has started prescribing Shot of Lead for common colds.
INTERNAL: Total Parity check: Dweller weights are within 0.5% of the communal average. Excellent.
DWELLER LOG: Someone left a Stealth Boy on in the bathroom. I think I bumped into a ghost.
SECURITY: Unauthorized use of V.A.T.S. during the Vault Bowling Tournament. Dweller #210 disqualified.
INCIDENT: The G.E.C.K. display case is empty. Security footage shows a Rad-Rat dragging it away.
INTERNAL: New Vault-Tec Policy: Laughter is the best medicine, unless you have Rad-Sickness. Use Rad-Away.
SECURITY: Found a Raider spike-trap in the North Corridor. How did they get in here?
INCIDENT: Dweller #445 was caught trying to breed Rad-Roaches for a Roach Racing league.
INTERNAL: The Air Purification system is now Lemon Scented. Ignore the chemical stinging sensation.
SECURITY: Unauthorized Holotape found in the library. Title: The Truth About Vault-Tec. Incinerated.
INCIDENT: The Coffee Maker is only dispensing Atomic Fire flavored sludge. Staff morale is critical.
SECURITY: Patrols found a tunnel being dug behind the Nuka-Cola machine. Leads to a dead end. Good.
INCIDENT: Dweller #772 has claimed they are the King of the Vault. They have been given a mop.
INTERNAL: The Lights will be dimmed to 5% for Hibernation Drill. Do not scream into the dark.
DWELLER LOG: I found a Pre-War postcard of Philadelphia. It looks so... green. Was it always that green?
SECURITY: Incident at the Water Purifier. Dweller #101 tried to Install a Chip they found in a trash can.
INTERNAL: All Pip-Boys are now locked to Amber Phosphor. Requesting Green is a sign of rebellion.
DWELLER LOG: My Pip-Boy is telling me my Rad-Level is Spicy. That’s probably fine.
SECURITY: A Mysterious Stranger was seen in the reactor room. He vanished before ID.
INTERNAL: Vault-Tec Message: Work harder, live longer! (Results not guaranteed).
SECURITY: Detected a Secret Society meeting in the storage lockers. Goal: More Butter on the Popcorn.
INCIDENT: The Elevator stopped between floors for 6 hours. Dweller #302 has emerged as a new person.
INTERNAL: Total Parity means your Fun Credits are exactly the same as everyone elses. Zero.
SECURITY: Found Graffiti on the reactor core. It says: THE OVERSEER EATS CRAM WITH A FORK.
INCIDENT: Dweller #882 has been Glow-Sticking the hallways. It’s neon paint. We think.
INTERNAL: The Mr. Handy unit has been programmed to Enforce Happiness. Resistance is futile.
SECURITY: Unauthorized Science project found in Sector 4. It’s a Toaster that talks to satellites.
INCIDENT: The Vault Library has been Categorized by smell. History smells like Dust and Sadness.
DWELLER LOG: I think the Overseer is a Synth. He doesnt Blink when he Talks.
SECURITY: Detected a Signal coming from Inside a Dwellers chest. It was a Pacemaker.
INTERNAL: Happiness is a Resource. Use it Wisely.
SECURITY: Patrols found a Secret room behind the Overseers office. It’s full of Toilet Paper.
INCIDENT: Dweller #122 tried to Fly off the Catwalk. Gravity won.
DWELLER LOG: I miss Daylight. The Glow of the Amber screen is my only Sun.
SECURITY: Found a Stash of Nuka-Cola caps under the Dining table. Gambling is Illegal.
INCIDENT: The Auto-Doc has Accidentally given Dweller #404 a Lobotomy. He’s much Happier now.
SECURITY: Detected a Hack on the Mainframe. Someone is trying to Unlock the Internet.
INCIDENT: The Water is Green today. St. Paddys Day was 200 years ago. Strange.
INTERNAL: Vault-Tec loves You. You love Vault-Tec. (Dont make it Weird).
SECURITY: Patrols found a Raider scouting the Vault entrance. He was Eaten by a Yao Guai.
INCIDENT: Dweller #909 has predicted Cram for dinner. He was correct. Investigating prescience.
SECURITY: Found a Secret tunnel to Vault 102. It’s Empty. And Creepy.
INCIDENT: The Mr. Handy unit is Singing Opera while it Recycles the Trash.
DWELLER LOG: I found a Pre-War nickel. I’m Rich in a Dead world.
SECURITY: Patrols found a Rad-Roach in the Overseers bed. It was Arrested.
INCIDENT: Dweller #333 has Claimed they are The One. They have been Re-Educated.
DWELLER LOG: I think the Machine Spirit is Hungry. I gave it a Paperclip.
SECURITY: Detected a Spy from Vault 101. He was Looking for Water.
INCIDENT: The Air smells like Old Socks and Nuclear Winter.
SECURITY: Patrols found a Ghoul in the Vent. He was Friendly. We Shot him anyway.
INCIDENT: Dweller #222 has Started a Cult of The Toaster.
SECURITY: Found a Secret stash of Nuka-Cola. Sugar is Illegal.
SECURITY: Detected a Signal from The Commonwealth. It’s a Radio about Settlements.
SECURITY: Patrols found a Raider in the Kitchen. He was Cooking. He’s a Good chef.
SECURITY: Patrols found Nothing.
INCIDENT: Dweller #1 has Died.
INTERNAL: Total Parity achieved.
SECURITY: All Clear.
INTERNAL: The Vault is Safe.
SECURITY: Lockdown Initiated.
INCIDENT: Overseer Missing.
INTERNAL: Total Parity... Lost.
SECURITY: External Breach Detected.
INCIDENT: Welcome to the Wasteland.
INTERNAL: Vault-Tec: Mission Failed.
SECURITY: Systems Offline.
INCIDENT: Final Entry.
FINAL LOG: War. War never changes.
